{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323185751F6A676A9ABBE9250E554"}"},"total":2578},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7394488803040477976","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很不错的一本书，前期的工作做的还是可以认同的，不过有些地方还是有部分的瑕疵，正常人应该会对于那些很在意，不过书里面没有过多说明，有着一些可以改进的地方。 
对于穿越文来说，这本书脑子还是有带了的，不是那种无脑爽的小说，有些地方也是用了好多经典的事件，可以稍微增长一下见识，不过有些地方如果不知道可能不清楚笑点嗷。
还有的地方需要改进，这个是每本书都应该认识到的，而且我们都可以作为那个进谏员，为整个小说市场出一份力[笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1721666229,"group_id":"7289697104241364025","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"死喽，写不出来字了，啊！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1nQ8qdgL7W2HM121VHFXILxko+a2hhJE0v7l92Kdirc","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/35a4af5e963142f8860736d7ec5e0086~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792617&x-signature=TjL3xXVzPzvQxUvXjw5z8BYT1sw%3D","user_id":"3456480993611031","user_name":"开不见头亡不见首"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3456480993611031","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1786213938,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7289697104241364025","book_info":{"abstract":"苏誉穿越到古代，第五次落榜当天，与伪装成普通人家姑娘的长乐郡主成了亲。
　不等苏誉撸起袖子赚钱养娇妻，那边被漏掉的科举捷报却突然传回。
　自此后，秀才、举人、会试、殿试，科举捷报频频传回。
　直到有一天，苏誉中状元的捷报传回，在家中的顾长乐：“......原先只打了招呼让他过院试做个秀才的，怎么转眼，连状元都中了？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/46b910a278c4cd52abe090f0245e6443","author":"菜比比","author_id":"","book_id":"7289697104241364025","book_name":"落榜当天，娶了个郡主娇妻回家","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#301818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":832,"name":"科举","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=832&name=科举&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7289697174277849659","read_count":"73001","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2016598"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"927","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,架空,科举,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7894edcfcdc34a0e4a92bd2648bf1e31~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779447471&x-signature=eE9p%2BLTNuFMnuL6LgWRHU3ujt%2B8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1179132352539902","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"374"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323185751F6A676A9ABBE9250E554"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":34191,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":21566},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7307796274958484233","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这一本书比之前两本书的架构更合理，节奏掌控得更好。大部分穿越到古代的小说，要么有系统要么开后宫，但是其实没有系统的剧情上限比较大，最起码剧情不会因为后期的财力或战力崩坏而烂尾。
这本书的走向估计是农家小子通过仕途和商业来慢慢成长，单女主而挺好的，而且男女主的戏份也兼顾得到，不像大部分穿越古代的小说那样把女主写成工具人或摆设。
另外我想给作者一个小小的建议，稳定更新比什么都重要，不然读者会跑的，有些养着养着就没了。作者和读者的关系也需要这种粘性的，“你若不弃，我定不离”。
第一本小说真的写得好，也希望这一本可以突破和超越，最后给个五星好评来鼓励作者，加油！[码住]","text_exts":[{"e":146,"s":142,"text":"穿越古代","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%A9%BF%E8%B6%8A%E5%8F%A4%E4%BB%A3&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742634719250E554%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227307796274958484233%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227289697104241364025%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%A9%BF%E8%B6%8A%E5%8F%A4%E4%BB%A3%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1701480183,"group_id":"7289697104241364025","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2gh3JPLqUxs8Wvzg8v9r8eo4JG3zm0qtrno1PjlJB0/","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p26-passport.byteacctimg.com/img/user-avatar/eafc6436782b95343d68b7b9153759b9~300x300.image","user_id":"2993285526992888","user_name":"LKM_2105"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2993285526992888","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1715445884,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7289697104241364025","book_info":{"abstract":"苏誉穿越到古代，第五次落榜当天，与伪装成普通人家姑娘的长乐郡主成了亲。

　自此后，秀才、举人、会试、殿试，科举捷报频频传回。
　直到有一天，苏誉中状元的捷报传回，在家中的顾长乐：“......原先只打了招呼让他过院试做个秀才的，怎么转眼，连状元都中了？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/46b910a278c4cd52abe090f0245e6443","author":"菜比比","author_id":"","book_id":"7289697104241364025","book_name":"落榜当天，娶了个郡主娇妻回家","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#301818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":832,"name":"科举","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=832&name=科举&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7289697174277849659","read_count":"73001","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2016598"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"927","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,架空,科举,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7894edcfcdc34a0e4a92bd2648bf1e31~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779447471&x-signature=eE9p%2BLTNuFMnuL6LgWRHU3ujt%2B8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1179132352539902","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.0023485e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323185751F6A676A9ABBE9250E554"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时
